best_window: Early morning to late morning before wind builds
report_text: Visibility is pretty limited at about 5-9 ft. Primary swell is around 2.3 ft @ 5s from W, so expect a little texture and surge around exposed reef. Wind gets into the 14 mph range, so the afternoon surface may get messy. Probably a quick-check day unless the cam looks cleaner than expected. Stay safe out there divers.
